Class Room

java.lang.Object
pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Room
public class Room extends Object
Represents a hotel room with basic attributes and occupancy state.

The Room holds metadata (number, description, price, capacity) and current stay state (guests, check-in date, planned checkout, notes). It provides simple check-in and checkout operations and a textual representation suitable for CLI output.

  • Constructor Summary

    Marks the room as occupied by the provided guests starting at checkinDate for the given number of days and stores optional notes.
    double
    checkout()
    Performs checkout: calculates total due based on nights spent (difference between check-in date and current date) multiplied by nightly price, clears occupancy state and returns the computed total.

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(int roomNumber, String description, double price, int capacity)
      Creates a new Room with the given fixed attributes.
      Parameters:
      roomNumber - room number (e.g. 101)
      description - textual description of the room
      price - nightly price
      capacity - maximum number of guests

  • Method Details

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Checks whether the room is currently available for check-in.
      Returns:
      true when the room is not occupied

    • checkin

      public void checkin(List<Guest> guests, LocalDate checkinDate, int days, String notes)
      Marks the room as occupied by the provided guests starting at checkinDate for the given number of days and stores optional notes.

      The method copies the guest list to avoid external mutation and computes the planned checkout date as checkinDate.plusDays(days).

      Parameters:
      guests - list of guests (firstName/lastName)
      checkinDate - start date of the stay
      days - planned length of stay in days
      notes - optional notes (may be null)

    • checkout

      public double checkout()
      Performs checkout: calculates total due based on nights spent (difference between check-in date and current date) multiplied by nightly price, clears occupancy state and returns the computed total.

      If the room is not occupied this method returns 0.0.

      Returns:
      total amount due for the stay, or 0.0 if room was not occupied

    • getRoomNumber

      public int getRoomNumber()
      Returns:
      room number

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      room description

    • getPrice

      public double getPrice()
      Returns:
      nightly price

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns:
      room capacity (max guests)

    • getGuests

      public List<Guest> getGuests()
      Returns a live list of guests currently registered for the room.
      Returns:
      list of Guest instances (may be empty)

    • getCheckinDate

      public LocalDate getCheckinDate()
      Returns:
      check-in date or null if not occupied

    • getCheckoutDate

      public LocalDate getCheckoutDate()
      Returns:
      planned checkout date or null if not occupied

    • getDays

      public int getDays()
      Returns:
      planned number of days for the stay (0 when not occupied)

    • isOccupied

      public boolean isOccupied()
      Returns:
      true if the room is currently occupied

    • getNotes

      public String getNotes()
      Returns:
      notes associated with the current stay or null

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a multi-line textual representation of the room suitable for CLI output. Includes occupancy details when the room is occupied.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      formatted string describing the room
